Add deterministic failures at each write boundary and retry/open tests.","acceptance_criteria":"Every write-boundary failure is retryable; matching empty partial states resume; mismatched or nonempty partial states fail closed; open requires both records; no deletion API.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:07.149848546Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:07.149848546Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-64n7","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-d7uj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T07:09:07.233799898Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added preflighted DAD1-first idempotent root coordinator. Matching empty partial records resume, both empty records reopen idempotently, nonempty or scope-mismatched partials fail closed, and open_root still requires both. Deterministic fail_after_writes(0/1), retry/open, mismatch, and authenticated high-water-only tests pass without deletion.
